description: Bicubic instead of bilinear resize to the canvas.
PixelRL + A2C agent from rl_deblur/, applied greedily.
Wiener deconvolution with an assumed mild Gaussian PSF.
White top-hat + black top-hat contrast boost.
High-boost filtering via FFT Gaussian high-pass mask.
Otsu global thresholding to a binary image.
